qa_pairs.question: What was the Helios supercomputer, and when and where was it installed?
qa_pairs.answer: Helios was a supercomputer composed of Graphical Processing Unit (GPGPU) nodes that was installed in the computing centre at Université Laval in the spring of 2014.

qa_pairs.question: What is the current operational status of the Helios supercomputer, and when were interactive accesses to it interrupted?
qa_pairs.answer: Helios is now closed. Interactive accesses were interrupted on October 26, 2022, in anticipation of its decommissioning.

qa_pairs.question: How can users extract their data from the Helios supercomputer?
qa_pairs.answer: Data can be extracted from Helios by using the Globus drop-off point mentioned in the document.
